arts.ttl: Torino’s Vanoli: “Let’s show we can grow even more”
arts.sum: As Serie A returns from the international break, Torino prepares to host Lecce in their fourth match of the season. On the eve of this clash, Torino’s head coach Paolo Vanoli addressed the media in a pre-match press conference. Vanoli began by acknowledging the challenges of returning from international duty: “The most delicate match is when you return from internationals. I’ve discussed this with the players; these are the most decisive games. arts.ttl: Serie A | Torino v Lecce: Match Preview
arts.sum: Torino will be hoping to continue their strong run of form when Serie A resumes, hosting a Lecce side that managed their first win just before the international break. The Granata secured back-to-back wins before the international break to build on their opening day draw with AC Milan. They’ll hope the hiatus hasn’t slowed their momentum, while Lecce will be buoyed by their slender victory over Cagliari at the end of August. New Torino manager Paolo Vanoli has overseen an unexpectedly strong start, with seven points from the first nine available. arts.ttl: Preview: Torino vs. Lecce - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Serie A clash between Torino and Lecce, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
